title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 381.055 - Powers of title insurer
text:
381.055.  Powers of title insurer. — Subject to the exceptions and restrictions contained in this chapter, a title insurer shall have the power to:
  (1)  Do only title insurance business; and
  (2)  Reinsure title insurance policies.
(L. 2000 S.B. 894, A.L. 2007 S.B. 66) 
Effective 1-01-08
